data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Also update tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-size-thresholds.sh — replace CLASSIFIER_GIT_DIR injections with _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR. AC: grep -v '^\s*#' tests/workflows/test-review-workflow-size-thresholds.sh | grep -qE 'CLASSIFIER_GIT_DIR' && exit 1 || true
